meaning: n.延缓(作用)剂adj.延缓的,使迟滞的
examples: The electrical property of flame-retardant engineering plastics, especially comparative tracking index (CTI) is described.
Asbestos, used as a flame retardant, can cause cancer.
Many products contained multiple flame retardant chemicals.
Take the small flame-retardant maker who appealed to the British billionaire for money in 1994.
There are, bizarrely, no federal guidelines for routine safety testing of flame retardant chemicals.
